steps.title: 03 · Read the shift deck heading and fact hierarchy review case · theory

content.text: A type scale creates repeatable relationships among body, small text, headings, and display roles. Relative units preserve user scaling, while minimum and maximum bounds prevent extreme viewport-driven sizes. Hierarchy also uses weight, line height, spacing, and structure; oversized text alone does not fix unclear content order. Apply it to shift deck heading and fact hierarchy review.
